## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot and resolve Zoom meeting link issues for Surge AI and Growth X weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2879.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Persistent Zoom link access problems despite multiple attempts](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Issue likely stems from calendar integration or Zoom account settings](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [Recommended solution: Remove and re-add Zoom meeting in team calendar](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3033.0)

## Topics

### Zoom Link Access Issues

  - [George Haikal experienced repeated difficulties accessing the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2879.0)
  - [Link worked for some participants but not for George](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
  - [Multiple attempts to join via calendar invite were unsuccessful](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [Confusion about whether the issue was calendar-related or Zoom-specific](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2917.0)

### Troubleshooting Steps

  - [Checked calendar invite multiple times](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Reviewed Zoom video instructions](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2917.0)
  - Examined meeting host details (<team@growthxlabs.com>)
  - [Requested direct link paste from other participants](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)

### Root Cause Analysis

  - [Suspected issue with calendar integration or Zoom account settings](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [Focus shifted to team profile and calendar management](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)

### Proposed Solution

  - [Remove Zoom meeting from existing calendar invite](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3093.0)
  - [Access team Zoomer account to adjust settings](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3074.0)
  - [Re-add new Zoom meeting to calendar invite](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3095.0)
  - [Ensure proper sharing settings for all participants](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)

### Team Profile Navigation

  - [Guided navigation to team profile section](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3076.0)
  - [Accessed calendar settings within team profile](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Edit existing meeting in team calendar](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3093.0)
  - [Remove current Zoom meeting link](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3095.0)
  - [Add new Zoom meeting with correct settings](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3095.0)
  - [Share updated invite with all participants](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3105.0)
  - [Verify upcoming meetings show correctly in team calendar](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3118.0)
  - [Monitor future meetings to ensure resolution of access issues](https://fathom.video/share/-gr3TBSaiDeVxyYsHu2FxqushyU8hNPi?tab=summary&timestamp=3127.0)
